query:
SELECT a.ca_state state, 
       count(*) cnt 
FROM dfs.`tmp/customer_address.parquet` a , 
     dfs.`tmp/customer.parquet` c , 
     dfs.`tmp/store_sales.parquet` s , 
     dfs.`tmp/date_dim.parquet` d , 
     dfs.`tmp/item.parquet` i 
WHERE a.ca_address_sk = c.c_current_addr_sk 
  AND c.c_customer_sk = s.ss_customer_sk 
  AND s.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk 
  AND s.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk 
  AND d.d_month_seq = 
    (SELECT DISTINCT (date_dim.d_month_seq) 
     FROM dfs.`tmp/date_dim.parquet` AS date_dim 
     WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2001 
       AND date_dim.d_moy = 1 ) 
  AND i.i_current_price > 1.2 * 
    (SELECT avg(j.i_current_price) 
     FROM dfs.`tmp/item.parquet` j 
     WHERE j.i_category = i.i_category) 
GROUP BY a.ca_state 
HAVING count(*) >= 10 
ORDER BY cnt NULLS FIRST, 
         a.ca_state NULLS FIRST 
LIMIT 100
